name: RightChoice
description:
What RightChoice Does??

Right Choice is a Local Listings Management Software that helps you grow and rank your local profiles via Google, Bing, Yelp, and various other directories. 

Source: RightChoice

➡️ Allows users to compare different products side by side.

➡️ Provides tailored product suggestions based on user preferences.

➡️ Aggregates and displays user reviews and ratings for various products.

➡️ Monitors and alerts users about price changes and deals.

➡️ Offers comprehensive product specifications and details.

➡️ Provides a mobile app for on-the-go access to features.

➡️ Enables users to create and manage shopping lists.

➡️ Helps users find nearby stores that carry the products they are interested in.

➡️ Tracks and stores users’ purchase history for easy reference.

➡️ Integrates with major e-commerce sites for seamless shopping.

Benefits

⭐️ Helps users make well-informed purchasing decisions with detailed comparisons.

⭐️ Saves time by providing all necessary product information in one place.

⭐️ Alerts users to the best deals and price drops, helping them save money.

⭐️ Improves the shopping experience with personalized recommendations.

⭐️ Builds user confidence through aggregated customer reviews and ratings.

⭐️ Offers the convenience of managing shopping lists and tracking purchases on mobile.

⭐️ Provides easy access to product information and comparisons anywhere, anytime.

⭐️ Helps users find products locally, saving on shipping time and costs.

⭐️ Allows users to easily track and reference their purchase history.

⭐️ Ensures a smooth shopping experience with integration to major e-commerce platforms.

Pros:

✅Customers find it extremely easy to use with robust features 

✅Knowledgable and prompt customer support team 

✅Centralized dashboard view

Cons: 

❌Might run into glitches here and there 

❌Customers say they are still waiting for a lot of new features that are under development

❌No citation builder available for local SEO management 

❌Local Rank Tracker is missing

Priced at $15 Per Month
what_people_say:
“You get everything you need for GBP right on your dashboard with ease of use. The insights shown are really helpful. Customer support is prompt and any issues raised are resolved actively. There are some features, especially bulk updates features is really helpful for us.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
